# Synx

> Synx 是隱私優先的淨資產管理與投資追蹤 App（iOS / Android）。整合多類資產管理：股票、ETF、加密貨幣、現金等，即時同步全球市場行情，零上傳，隱私優先。

## About

Synx helps users track their complete financial picture — assets, investments, liabilities, and cash flow — in one place. Real-time global market price sync for stocks, ETFs, cryptocurrencies, and precious metals across multiple exchanges.

Key features:
- Privacy-first: no server upload, no bank credentials required
- Semi-automatic: fixed transactions auto-execute; DCA investments prefilled from live prices for one-tap confirmation
- Multi-market: global market coverage, multi-currency support
- iCloud backup, offline-first, Face ID protection
- Free tier available; Synx Pro subscription for advanced features

## App Download

- iOS App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6753709890
- Google Play: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.synxapp.synx
